{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Seed of Honor
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Seed of Honor]] is a bronze monument in [[Moongrave]] representing [[Malice]] founding the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Seed of Honor]] is a bronze monument of [[Malice]] pulling back a bow that resembles [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
